top_signals.title: U.S. and Iran agree to deal halting war that shook Middle East
top_signals.summary: Officials from the two countries will meet in Switzerland on June 19 to formally sign the agreement, a decision that suggests aspects of the deal may still remain unresolved.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
